offer: For Etsy sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, invoice discrepancies cause cash flow gaps. We provide a chatbot solution instead of manual email communication with vendors.
problem: Resolving vendor inquiries and invoice discrepancies in a timely manner.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Etsy sellers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM outreach to Etsy sellers with demo video
Share in community forums for Etsy tools
try_it: Let users try invoice tracking and discrepancy prompts on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing invoices
Enable one-click export of simple reports
Streamline onboarding steps for new users
